entity.summary: Modular V4 decentralized exchange and DeFi hub on Monad, offering spot swaps, concentrated liquidity, advanced orders, cross-chain swaps, launchpad access, farming, staking, and perpetuals infrastructure.
entity.notes: HEI uses Monad's public-mainnet launch date of 2025-11-24 because an official ecosystem integration identified Atlantis as a day-one Monad liquidity provider and the Atlantis roadmap places mainnet in Q4 2025-Q1 2026. The exact exchange launch timestamp was not independently preserved, so confidence is medium.

events.title: Atlantis launched with Monad public mainnet
events.description: Atlantis entered mainnet operation as a modular V4 decentralized exchange and spot-liquidity venue on Monad.
events.notes: The date combines the independently documented Monad public-mainnet date with a day-one ecosystem announcement naming Atlantis as an onchain liquidity provider.

evidence.title: Atlantis DEX on Monad
evidence.notes: First-party site defines Atlantis as a modular V4 DEX on Monad and links its live swap, bridge, launchpad, staking, and other applications.

evidence.title: Monad mainnet launches
evidence.notes: Independent report provides the exact November 24, 2025 public-mainnet date used for the day-one Atlantis launch marker.

evidence.title: Monad is live on Rubic from day one
evidence.notes: Official ecosystem-provider post identifies Atlantis among Monad's day-one onchain liquidity providers.

evidence.title: Atlantis Monad exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile links the Atlantis Monad application and tracks its markets.

evidence.title: Atlantis brings onchain perpetuals to Monad via Orbs Perpetual Hub
evidence.notes: Technology-provider publication confirms Atlantis's active Monad deployment and expansion from spot trading into perpetuals infrastructure.
